overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi exploration game showing an astronaut character exploring a neon-lit alien trading outpost at night. The character ascends a towering structure via escalator and interacts with alien vendors at a marketplace.

massive sci-fi tower with external escalator ramp and hexagonal archway
blue-lit rocky hills under starry sky

segments.scene_description: On an alien landing pad at night, the character stands near a service structure before walking toward an imposing tower with an external escalator, with blue rocky terrain visible in the background under a starry sky.

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a vendor stall with a blue curved counter and large green holographic trade sign, facing an alien vendor seated behind computer screens.

segments.scene_description: Moving to a trading terminal displaying star charts on multiple screens, the character observes several alien NPCs conversing nearby, including one in an orange suit waving in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate alien landing pad into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a high-altitude trading outpost. It begins on a dark landing pad beside a service structure, moving across blue rocky terrain under a starry sky toward an imposing tower. As the character enters the tower, the scene shifts to a steady ascent up an external escalator, framed by dark metal hexagonal archways and artificial lighting. The camera then follows the character as they exit the escalator onto an upper platform, where the environment opens into a bustling marketplace filled with domed vendor stalls and glowing green holographic signs. Finally, the movement leads through the crowd of alien NPCs toward a blue curved counter and a trading terminal displaying star charts, ending as a figure in an orange suit waves in the background.
